name: Intelligent Hotel Group Ltd.
summary: PART I Overview Intelligent Hotel Group Ltd, formerly known as YCQH Agricultural Technology Co., Ltd, was incorporated under the laws of the State of Nevada on October 15, 2019. On May 6, 2025, the Company filed a Certificate of Amendment with the Nevada Secretary of State to change its name to Intelligent Hotel Group Ltd (the Name Change), which was previously approved by the Board of Directors on April 15, 2025. To reflect the Name Change, the Board approved a corresponding amendment to the Co...
